Title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
Why It Matters: The severity increased, so the control should be reviewed before reusing old risk notes, tickets, or evidence.
Check Summary: Review Windows audit policy settings in Local Security Policy and export applied GPO evidence.
Fix Summary: Configure Windows audit policy through GPO and document the applied baseline.
Evidence Needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes; GPO, registry, browser policy, or configuration export

Title: Firewall management access must be restricted
Why It Matters: A new high-severity control was added, so it should be reviewed before lower-risk backlog items.
Check Summary: Review firewall management network restrictions and approved admin source ranges.
Fix Summary: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.
Evidence Needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes; Device configuration excerpt or management console export

Title: Linux SSH banner must be configured
Why It Matters: The validation steps changed enough that evidence requests may need to be refreshed.
Check Summary: Run sshd -T and review the banner setting and file permissions.
Fix Summary: Configure the sshd Banner directive in /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
Evidence Needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes; Command output and relevant configuration file excerpt

Title: Removed database audit control
Why It Matters: The control was removed from the newer file; review whether open tickets or evidence requests can be closed or retired.
Evidence Needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes; Database configuration query output or admin console export
